programme.title: My Clueless First Friend
programme.desc: Nishimura faces constant teasing from classmates who cruelly call her the Grim Reaper. However, a new transfer student named Takada finds her fascinating and happily befriends her.

programme.desc: Kankuro and Temari are berated by Baki for not keeping watch over their brother Gaara who appears missing. Meanwhile, Gaara tries to kill Lee after entering his room.

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: When Sasuke does not turn up for the tournament on time, Naruto is left concerned and the Anbu begin searching for him. However, the delay causes Genma to begin Naruto's match with Neji.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal boards an autorickshaw to get to work, but the vehicle breaks down mid-way. Later, Popatlal bumps into a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal falls in love with the woman on the bicycle and calls his friends to tell them about her. However, he fails to get her name or number.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal falls in love with the woman on the bicycle and calls his friends to tell them about her. However, he fails to get her name or number.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Popatlal stands on the street in the rain, he meets the love of his life a second time. He proposes to her and is surprised when she says yes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal meets Champaklal and seeks his blessing before meeting the love of his life at the same location where they met last time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal goes to a road crossing in the middle of the rain to sell 'chana'. A group of children see this and crowd around him to buy his product.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham hear about Popatlal's financial worries and pity him. They wish there were something they could do to stop him from selling 'chana'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On Daya's suggestion, Tapu Sena joins Popatlal to search for Miss Tring-Tring. Later, everyone offers their help to Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal orders Nattu Kaka and Bagha to search for Miss Tring-Tring around the shop and give them the descriptions of her bicycle to identify her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal goes to a traffic signal in Powder Gully to wait for Miss Tring-Tring. However, he somehow gets into trouble before she even arrives.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal desperately waits for Miss Tring-Tring and vows to meet her at any cost. However, she does not arrive.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A group of thugs chases Popatlal and Miss Tring-Tring on their vehicles. Fortunately, the couple manages to hide from them and ultimately get rescued.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the gangsters prepare to shoot him, Popatlal stops them and begs them to reconsider their decision. Later. Popatlal asks the thugs to let Kiran go.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham celebrate Popatlal's bravery in getting the drug gang arrested. Afterwards, a television producer meets Popatlal to honour him for his actions.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: While celebrating his daughter's 20th birthday, a businessman receives a threat. Soon, the CID team is called to investigate the death of his daughter, who dies in a blast.

programme.title: CID

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: All the residents excitedly head to Gada Electronics together. However, the store is overcrowded, leaving them anxious about the fate of their coupons.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal panics when he witnesses Inspector Pandey walking into Gada Electronics. Later, Popatlal claims that the scheme is fake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu informs Jethalal and Champaklal about the lucky draw results. In the meantime, the residents discuss what they would do if they win the car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ajay Dewan has challenged the Gokuldham residents to help him sell a 10 crore ruby. Whoever does so will get one crore in return.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ajay Dewan goes missing. Meanwhile, Jethalal reveals the truth about the ruby to ACP Pradyuman in Gokuldham society.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Raju's neighbours start asking him questions when they find something suspicious in his red suitcase. Later, Raju's wife Smita informs Team CID that someone tricked him and gave him the suitcase.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The new owners of a house receive a threat note and a severed finger. They suspect the former owner, while the CID team attempts to find the identity of the victim.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A young couple notices a woman who is trying to get their attention while they are driving. As soon as they decide to help her, she dies saying 'save her'.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A real murder takes place when a group of friends play their monthly murder mystery game. Team CID is baffled since no one could have entered the house and all contestants have strong alibis.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi informs Roshan he will be unable to accompany her due to his professional commitments. Later, Madhavi mediates a fight between Roshan and Sodhi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An excited Jethalal calls Sodhi and they talk about Madhavi's dinner invite. Later, Sodhi's childhood friends arrive at the garage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sodhi refuses to throw a party, his friends leave in a huff. Afterwards, he calls Jethalal and confides in him about his problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: To escape the dinner party, Sodhi pretends to have a stomach ache. Shortly after, a worried Anjali gives him some home remedies and refuses to leave his side.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sodhi starts to have intense stomach pains, Chapaklal calls Dr Hathi to get him checked out. But Jethalal is afraid that Dr Hathi would catch Sodhi's lie and the truth would come out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi is sent to Dr Hathi so that he can be examined for his illness. But once he gets there, he tells Dr Hathi that he was faking it to get out of the mess he had landed in.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Popatlal cross numerous obstacles and finally succeed in reaching the society gate. Soon, they see Babita and Iyer near Abdul's shop and rush inside in an effort to hide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi's childhood friends go to Bhide's home searching for him. Shortly after, Jethalal calls Sodhi and informs him about what happened.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Poptalal and Sodhi party with Sodhi's childhood friends. Afterwards, Roshan is furious to learn that the residents of Gokuldham did not inform her about Sodhi's illness.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to convince Roshan to stay at Bhide's house and not to check up on Sodhi. Later, Roshan calls Sodhi and realises that he is lying.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A furious Champaklal chases Jethalal with a stick after learning about his lies. Shortly after, he makes him call Sodhi who admits that he is enjoying himself thoroughly.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan and other Gokuldham residents overhear Sodhi bragging to his friends. Later, Anjali and Babita plead with Roshan to listen to Sodhi's side of the story.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi informs Roshan that he wanted to party as he met his friends after five years. Later, a furious Roshan threatens to leave him and stay with her parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As everything has ended on a good note between Sodhi and Roshan, Gokuldham society members look forward to a new day.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: After analysing the dead bodies of three men, Dr Salunkhe affirms that the killer murders like a wild animal. Later, Team CID uses their wit and the doctor's suggestion to nab the culprit.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Milina, the lead singer of a rock band is shot dead during a concert. Later, Team CID relies on Dr Salunkhe's expertise to pinpoint the exact location the bullet was fired from.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society look forward to the last two prizes. Later, Popatlal is overjoyed as he wins the honeymoon package.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Champaklal about the prizes won by the residents of Gokuldham. Later, Nattu Kaka reveals that Babita got the car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita is terrified after having a nightmare about her coupon. Later, Jethalal leaves the house after taking everyone's coupons with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita pleads with Jethalal to have the car delivered the following day. Later, Jethalal reveals that the vehicle cannot be handed over in time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Jethalal stamps the coupons, he realises that the pre-inked porous pad is dry. Later, Jethalal accidentally spills ink on a coupon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives a certificate of appreciation from Ramsung. Later, Jethalal decides to tell Rustom that he does not possess the car coupon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha works hard to keep the truth from Babita and Rustom. Meanwhile, the Mahila Mandal excitedly waits for Babita's new car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Following Jethalal's prank in the Gokuldham society, there is mayhem in the lives of all his married friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham feels worried when Abdul prepares to sell his shop and bids farewell during the festival.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Champak Chacha suggest Jethalal should workout after learning that he woke up due to a nightmare. Tapu teaches him Suryanamaskar.

programme.desc: The members eagerly prepare for the festival. After finishing their work, everyone goes to sleep early, but chaos ensues when a massive storm arrives.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena plan to punish the members of Gokuldham Society by putting on a talent show in which they have to act like hens.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshani calls Baga to perform on the stage. Nattu Kaka tells him to not embarrass Jetha, but Baga's imitation of an actor successfully entertains the crowd.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer is called to say `I love you' to Babita in different languages on stage, but Jetha tries to mess with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jetha and Daya are challenged not to dance when the music plays. Daya struggles to finish the challenge, and Iyer wants Jetha to fail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Unable to get his tea, an upset Jethalal calls Bagha to fix his broken gas stove. Daya's hand gets injured.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is glad when Babita comes to their house and helps prepare breakfast after Daya accidentally injures her hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer and Babita visit Jethalal to explain why he did not call him the day before. However, Iyer slips on a banana peel and the residents rush to help him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Bapuji wait for Jethalal to drop them off at Bapuji's friend's house, but Jethalal is missing. Tapu asks Sonu to accept a parcel delivery in his absence.

programme.desc: Jethalal accidentally answers Iyer on the phone and asks Bagha to talk to him instead. However, Iyer demands to talk to Jethalal and asks him about Babita's phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal pleads with the goons who have Babita's phone, begging them to return it. They remain resolute in their decision and demand money.

programme.desc: Tapu and his friends accidentally injure Bhide. Everyone is surprised by Sunita's unexpectedly high vegetable prices.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal excitedly reveals that he won a challenge because of Jethalal. Soon, Jethalal asks Sundarlal for a commission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal eagerly plans a surprise for Jethalal and tries to wake Champaklal and Tapu from their deep sleep.
